parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "source": "n8n",
  "severity": "{{ $('Preparar Payload Wazuh').first().json.original_alert.severity }}",
  "rule_name": "{{ $('Preparar Payload Wazuh').first().json.original_alert.rule_name }}",
  "description": "{{ $('Preparar Payload Wazuh').first().json.original_alert.description }}",
  "source_ip": "{{ $('Preparar Payload Wazuh').first().json.original_alert.source_ip }}",
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "category": "{{ $('Preparar Payload Wazuh').first().json.original_alert.category }}",
  "event_count": {{ $('Preparar Payload Wazuh').first().json.original_alert.event_count || 1 }},
  "data_source": "n8n_workflow"
}

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('Wazuh y Logstash: envío completado correctamente.');
return [{ json: { success: true, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
